TEXT_CODE_c59b7cb2:
BLR System Command List

slr (Subscribe to Live Room)
Subscribe to a live room to receive @ reminders when the live starts

us (Unsubscribe)
Unsubscribe from a live room

lr (Live Room)
View information about your subscribed live rooms

rs (Recording Status)
View recorder information for your subscribed live rooms

sr (Start Recording)
Enable the recorder for your subscribed live rooms

str (Stop Recording)
Disable the recorder

Debug Commands: debug.*
